title: N+1 Query Pattern
description: Avoid `await` inside loops. Use `Promise.all()` or bulk operations.

title: Blocking Synchronous I/O
description: Avoid synchronous I/O methods in server code.

title: SQL LIKE with Leading Wildcard
description: Leading wildcard in LIKE query prevents index usage.

title: Nested Loop in Component
description: Nested loop in component render detected (O(n²)). Move to useMemo or backend.

title: Unstable Prop
description: Object/Function literal passed as prop causes re-renders. Consider useMemo/useCallback.

title: Memory Leak
description: useEffect with subscription (setInterval/addEventListener) missing cleanup function.

title: Global State Mutation
description: Avoid mutating global state in useEffect without cleanup/reset mechanism.

title: Race Condition
description: State update after await should be guarded by isMounted or cleanup flag.

title: Race Condition - Global Flag
description: Avoid using global flag for synchronization.

title: Console.log Usage
description: Avoid console.log in production code.

title: Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Define as constant.

title: Unhandled Promise
description: Promise chain does not end with .catch() or return.

title: Missing Error Boundary
description: Root render missing ErrorBoundary wrapper.

title: Hardcoded Secret
description: Potential hardcoded secret (password, token, key) detected. Use environment variables.

title: Weak Cryptography
description: Weak cryptographic algorithm (MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4) detected. Use SHA-256 or better.

title: Insecure Randomness
description: Math.random() used in security context. Use crypto.getRandomValues() or crypto module.

title: Dangerous InnerHTML
description: Usage of dangerouslySetInnerHTML or .innerHTML detected. Ensure content is sanitized.

title: Dangerous Execution
description: Avoid exec() or eval() as they can execute arbitrary code.

title: Circular Dependency
description: Circular import dependency detected. This creates tight coupling and makes code harder to maintain.

title: Deep Dependency Chain
description: File has a very deep dependency chain (>10 levels). Consider refactoring to reduce coupling.

title: God Object
description: Class has too many methods or high complexity. Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes.

title: Large File
description: File has excessive line count. Consider splitting into smaller, focused modules for better maintainability and AI code assistance.

title: Hook Called Conditionally
description: React hooks must be called in the same order on every render. Do not call hooks inside conditionals.

title: Hook Called in Loop
description: React hooks must not be called inside loops. This violates Rules of Hooks.

title: Missing Hook Dependencies
description: useEffect/useCallback/useMemo has empty dependency array but uses variables from outer scope.

title: Stale Closure in Hook
description: useEffect missing dependency array may cause stale closures.

title: Missing Key Prop
description: Array.map() in JSX should include unique key prop for each element.

title: Inline Function in JSX
description: Inline function in JSX prop causes unnecessary re-renders. Extract to useCallback or component-level function.

title: Inline Object in JSX
description: Inline object/array literal in JSX prop. Extract to constant or useMemo to avoid re-renders.

title: Prop Drilling
description: Props passed through multiple component levels. Consider using Context or composition.

title: Missing React.memo
description: Component may benefit from React.memo() to prevent unnecessary re-renders.

title: Expensive Computation in Render
description: Expensive array operation in render. Wrap with useMemo to avoid re-computation.

title: Missing API Authentication
description: Route handler missing authentication check. Sensitive endpoints should verify user identity.

title: Missing Input Validation
description: Route handler missing input validation. Always validate request body/params.

title: Missing Rate Limiting
description: API server created without rate limiting. Add rate limiting middleware to prevent abuse.

title: Unbounded Database Query
description: Database query without limit. Always paginate results to prevent resource exhaustion.

title: Insecure CORS Policy
description: Wildcard CORS policy detected. Specify exact origins instead of '*' for security.

title: Missing Alt Text
description: Image element missing alt attribute. Add alt text for screen readers.

title: Missing Input Label
description: Input field missing accessible label. Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or label element.

title: Button Without Text
description: Button/link has no accessible text. Add text content or aria-label for screen readers.

title: Clickable Element Missing Role
description: Clickable element missing role attribute. Add role="button" or use semantic HTML.

title: Invalid ARIA Attribute
description: Potentially invalid ARIA attribute. Verify against ARIA specification.

title: Unsafe Pickle Usage
description: Unsafe pickle usage. Never unpickle data from untrusted sources. Consider using json instead.

title: Unsafe YAML Loading
description: Unsafe YAML loading. Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load() to prevent code execution.

title: Dangerous eval/exec
description: Avoid eval()/exec(). They can execute arbitrary code and are major security risks.

title: Python SQL Injection
description: Potential SQL injection. Use parameterized queries instead of string formatting.

title: Python Shell Injection
description: subprocess.call/run with shell=True and user input can lead to command injection.

title: Python Path Traversal
description: os.path.join or open() with unsanitized user input can lead to path traversal attacks.

title: Python Inefficient Loop
description: For loop building list with append(). Use list comprehension for better performance.

title: Python Mutable Default Argument
description: Mutable default arguments ([], {}, set()) create shared state. Use None and initialize in function.

title: Python Slow Loop
description: Nested loops detected. Consider optimizing with list comprehensions, itertools, or vectorized operations.

title: Python Memory Intensive Operation
description: Large list/dict comprehension or file reading may consume significant memory. Consider using generators or chunked processing.

title: Python Blocking Call
description: Blocking I/O call in async function. Use async alternatives to avoid blocking the event loop.

title: Python Missing Type Hints
description: Function definition missing type hints. Add type annotations for better code clarity and static type checking.

title: Python Broad Exception Handling
description: Bare except or catching Exception is too broad. Catch specific exceptions to handle errors appropriately.

title: Python Unused Import
description: Potentially unused import. Remove if not used to keep code clean.

title: Python Complex Comprehension
description: Complex comprehension may be hard to read. Consider extracting to a regular loop or breaking into multiple comprehensions.

title: Python Circular Import
description: Many imports detected. Review for potential circular imports. Consider using dependency injection or lazy imports.

title: Python God Module
description: Module has too many top-level definitions or too much top-level code. Consider splitting into smaller, focused modules.

title: Python Deep Nesting
description: Deep nesting detected. Consider refactoring with early returns, guard clauses, or extracting functions.

title: Java SQL Injection
description: SQL injection via string concatenation. Use PreparedStatement with parameterized queries.

title: Java Unsafe Deserialization
description: Unsafe deserialization can lead to remote code execution. Validate types or use safer alternatives.

title: Java Broken Double-Checked Locking
description: Double-checked locking without volatile is broken. Use volatile or eager initialization.

title: Java Synchronized Collection Misuse
description: synchronized collections need manual sync for compound ops. Use Concurrent collections instead.

title: Java Resource Leak
description: Resource not closed properly. Use try-with-resources for AutoCloseable resources.

title: Java XSS Vulnerability
description: Potential XSS vulnerability. Escape user input before outputting to HTML.

title: Java Path Traversal
description: Path traversal risk. Validate and sanitize file paths from user input.

title: Java Weak Cryptography
description: Weak cryptographic algorithm. Use stronger algorithms like SHA-256, AES-256-GCM.

title: Java N+1 Query Problem
description: N+1 query problem detected. Batch queries or use JOIN FETCH in JPA/Hibernate.

title: Java Slow Collection
description: Inefficient collection usage. Consider using more appropriate collection types.

title: Java Memory Leak
description: Potential memory leak detected. Ensure proper cleanup of resources and listeners.

title: Java Blocking I/O
description: Blocking I/O operation. Consider using async alternatives for better scalability.

title: Java Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant with descriptive name.

title: Java Unused Import
description: Potentially unused import. Remove if not used to keep code clean.

title: Java Broad Exception Handling
description: Catching Exception or Throwable is too broad. Catch specific exception types.

title: Java Missing Null Check
description: Method may return null. Add null check before using the result.

title: Java Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependency detected. Consider using dependency injection or breaking cycles.

title: Java God Class
description: Class has too many methods or members. Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes.

title: Java Deep Inheritance Hierarchy
description: Deep inheritance hierarchy detected. Consider using composition over inheritance.

title: Java Tight Coupling
description: High coupling detected. Consider using dependency injection and programming to interfaces.

title: Spring Missing Transaction
description: Data modification method missing @Transactional annotation.

title: Spring Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependency in Spring beans. Consider using @Lazy or refactoring.

title: Spring Lazy Initialization
description: Consider @Lazy initialization for large beans or be aware of proxy behavior.

title: Spring Missing Authorization
description: Controller endpoint missing authorization annotation. Add @PreAuthorize or @Secured.

title: Spring N+1 Query Problem
description: N+1 query problem in Spring/JPA. Use JOIN FETCH or @EntityGraph.

title: C# SQL Injection
description: SQL injection via string concatenation. Use SqlCommand with SqlParameter objects.

title: C# LDAP Injection
description: LDAP injection risk. Sanitize and escape user input in LDAP filters.

title: C# XSS Vulnerability
description: XSS vulnerability. Use HttpUtility.HtmlEncode or HtmlEncoder.Default.Encode to encode user input.

title: C# Path Traversal
description: Path traversal risk. Validate and sanitize file paths from user input.

title: C# Boxing
description: Boxing value types to object causes performance overhead. Use generic types.

title: C# String Concatenation in Loop
description: String concatenation in loops is slow. Use StringBuilder for better performance.

title: C# N+1 Query Problem
description: N+1 query problem detected. Load related data eagerly with Include() or use projection.

title: C# Slow LINQ Query
description: Inefficient LINQ query. Consider combining operations or using compiled queries.

title: C# Memory Leak
description: Potential memory leak detected. Ensure proper cleanup of resources and event handlers.

title: C# Blocking Async Call
description: Blocking async call. Using .Result or .Wait() blocks the thread. Use await instead.

title: C# Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant with descriptive name.

title: C# Unused Using Directive
description: Unused using directive. Remove if not needed.

title: C# Broad Exception Handling
description: Catching broad exception type. Catch specific exceptions or rethrow after logging.

title: C# Missing Null Check
description: Potential NullReferenceException. Add null check or use null-conditional operator (?.).

title: C# Resource Leak
description: Resource leak: IDisposable resource without using statement. Wrap in using() statement.

title: C# Async Void
description: async void makes error handling difficult. Use async Task instead (except for event handlers).

title: C# Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependency detected. Consider using dependency injection or breaking cycles.

title: C# God Class
description: God class detected. Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes following Single Responsibility Principle.

title: C# Deep Inheritance Hierarchy
description: Deep inheritance hierarchy detected. Consider using composition over inheritance or flattening the hierarchy.

title: C# Tight Coupling
description: Tight coupling detected. Consider using dependency injection to reduce coupling and improve testability.

title: C# Entity Framework N+1 Query
description: Entity Framework N+1 query problem. Use Include() or projection to load related data eagerly.

title: C# Entity Framework Missing Index
description: Query might benefit from an index. Consider adding [Index] attribute or HasIndex() in OnModelCreating.

title: C# ASP.NET Missing Authorization
description: ASP.NET action method missing [Authorize] attribute. Add [Authorize] to protect the endpoint.

title: C# ASP.NET Missing Validation
description: Model parameter missing validation. Add validation attributes or check ModelState.IsValid.

title: Go SQL Injection
description: SQL injection risk. Use parameterized queries with ? placeholders instead of string concatenation.

title: Go Command Injection
description: Command injection risk. Avoid shell execution with user input. Use exec.Command with separate arguments.

title: Go Path Traversal
description: Path traversal risk. Sanitize user input using filepath.Clean, filepath.Base, or filepath.Join before file operations.

title: Go Defer in Loop
description: defer in loop accumulates until function returns, causing resource leaks. Move cleanup to separate function.

title: Go Slow String Builder
description: String concatenation in loop is inefficient. Use strings.Builder for better performance when building strings in loops.

title: Go Memory Leak
description: Large slice allocation without bounds checking. Ensure memory usage is bounded to prevent memory leaks.

title: Go Blocking Goroutine
description: Blocking I/O operation in goroutine. Consider using context.WithTimeout or non-blocking patterns.

title: Go Inefficient Slice
description: Slice allocation without capacity hint. If you know the approximate size, use make([]T, 0, capacity) to reduce allocations.

title: Go Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant for better readability and maintainability.

title: Go Unused Import
description: Unused import detected. Remove unused imports to keep code clean.

title: Go Broad Error Handling
description: Broad error handling. Provide specific error context or handle errors more specifically.

title: Go Missing Error Check
description: Missing error check. Always check errors returned from functions.

title: Go Resource Leak
description: Potential resource leak. Use defer file.Close() or defer resp.Body.Close() to ensure resources are closed.

title: Go Ignored Error
description: Error return value ignored with blank identifier. Handle or explicitly document why safe to ignore.

title: Go Goroutine Leak
description: Goroutine without cleanup mechanism. Use context.WithCancel, done channel, or sync.WaitGroup.

title: Go Channel Deadlock
description: Unbuffered channel can cause deadlock. Ensure send/receive in different goroutines or use buffered channel.

title: Go Race Condition
description: Potential race condition. Use sync.Mutex, sync.RWMutex, or atomic operations to protect shared state.

title: Go Panic in Library
description: panic() in library code. Return errors instead - let callers decide how to handle errors.

title: Go Missing Error Handling
description: Missing error handling. Always check and handle errors returned from functions.

title: Go Panic in Production
description: panic() in production code. Return errors instead of panicking - let callers decide how to handle errors.

title: Go Circular Import
description: Potential circular import. Circular imports can cause compilation issues and tight coupling.

title: Go God Package
description: Package has too many responsibilities. Consider splitting into smaller, focused packages.

title: Go Deep Nesting
description: Deep nesting detected. Consider refactoring to reduce nesting depth for better readability.

title: Go Tight Coupling
description: Package-level variable (global state) can lead to tight coupling. Consider using dependency injection.

title: Rust Unsafe Block
description: unsafe block or function. Document why necessary and ensure safety invariants are maintained.

title: Rust Unwrap Panic
description: .unwrap() can panic. Use .unwrap_or(), .expect() with message, or ? operator for error handling.

title: Rust Clone Overuse
description: Excessive .clone() usage. Consider references, Rc/Arc, or restructuring to avoid unnecessary clones.

title: Rust Send/Sync Violation
description: unsafe impl Send/Sync or raw pointers in structs. Ensure thread safety invariants are maintained.

title: Rust Unnecessary Allocation
description: Vec/String parameter when &[T]/&str would suffice. Use references to avoid forcing allocations.

title: Rust Uninitialized Memory
description: Uninitialized memory access. Ensure memory is properly initialized before use.

title: Rust Dangling Pointer
description: Potential dangling pointer. Ensure pointer is valid and not dangling before use.

title: Rust Data Race
description: Potential data race. Use thread-safe alternatives like Mutex, RwLock, or atomic types.

title: Rust Slow Clone
description: Expensive clone operation. Consider using references, Rc/Arc, or restructuring to avoid clones.

title: Rust Blocking Async
description: Blocking operation in async function. Use async alternatives to avoid blocking the executor.

title: Rust Memory Leak
description: Potential memory leak. Ensure memory is properly managed and cleaned up.

title: Rust Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant for better readability.

title: Rust Unused Import
description: Unused import or wildcard import. Prefer explicit imports to avoid namespace pollution.

title: Rust Unwrap in Production
description: .unwrap() can panic in production. Use proper error handling with match, if let, or ? operator.

title: Rust Missing Error Handling
description: Missing error handling for Result type. Handle errors with match, if let, ? operator, or .unwrap()/.expect().

title: Rust Complex Match
description: Complex match expression. Consider extracting to a function or using a different pattern.

title: Rust Unnecessary Borrow
description: Unnecessary borrow. Copy types can be passed by value, or prefer &str/&[T] over &String/&Vec<T>.

title: Rust Move After Borrow
description: Potential move after borrow. Ensure borrows don't outlive the moved value.

title: Rust Lifetime Violation
description: Potential lifetime violation. Ensure references outlive their usage or add explicit lifetime parameters.

title: Rust Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependency. Circular dependencies can cause compilation issues and tight coupling.

title: Rust God Module
description: Module has too many responsibilities. Consider splitting into smaller, focused modules.

title: Rust Deep Nesting
description: Deep nesting detected. Consider refactoring to reduce nesting depth for better readability.

title: Rust Tight Coupling
description: Tight coupling detected. Consider using dependency injection or passing dependencies explicitly.

title: C++ Buffer Overflow
description: Unsafe C string functions (strcpy, strcat, sprintf, gets, scanf) can cause buffer overflows. Use safer alternatives.

title: C++ Use After Free
description: Accessing memory after delete/free causes undefined behavior. Set pointer to nullptr/NULL after freeing.

title: C++ Null Dereference
description: Dynamic allocation can return NULL/nullptr. Check for null before dereferencing.

title: C++ Format String Vulnerability
description: Format string vulnerability in printf/scanf/syslog. Use string literal format string or validate input.

title: C++ Memory Leak
description: Memory allocated with new/malloc must be freed with delete/free. Use smart pointers or RAII.

title: C++ Double Free
description: Freeing memory twice causes undefined behavior. Set pointer to nullptr/NULL after first free.

title: C++ RAII Violation
description: Raw owning pointer detected. Use std::unique_ptr or std::shared_ptr for automatic resource management.

title: C++ Data Race
description: Unsynchronized access to shared mutable state. Use std::mutex or std::atomic.

title: C++ Deadlock Risk
description: Multiple locks acquired without consistent ordering or RAII. Use std::scoped_lock or std::lock_guard.

title: C++ Undefined Behavior
description: Code pattern that causes undefined behavior (signed overflow, array out of bounds, dereferencing end(), etc.).

title: C++ Slow Algorithm
description: Inefficient algorithm detected (O(n²) operations, linear search in loop, vector erase in loop). Optimize algorithm or use better data structures.

title: C++ Inefficient Copy
description: Unnecessary copy of large object (std::string, std::vector). Use const reference or move semantics.

title: C++ Blocking I/O
description: Blocking I/O operation detected. Consider using async I/O or separate thread for better performance.

title: C++ Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant with descriptive name.

title: C++ Unused Include
description: Unused include detected. Remove if not needed.

title: C++ Raw Pointer
description: Raw pointer detected. Consider using smart pointer (unique_ptr/shared_ptr) or reference.

title: C++ Missing Null Check
description: Pointer dereferenced without null check. Check for null before dereferencing.

title: C++ Resource Leak
description: Resource opened without cleanup (file, socket, mutex). Use RAII wrapper or ensure cleanup is called.

title: C++ Signed Overflow
description: Signed integer arithmetic can overflow (undefined behavior). Consider using unsigned types or check for overflow.

title: C++ Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependencies detected. Consider using forward declarations or dependency injection to break cycles.

title: C++ God Class
description: God class detected. Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes.

title: C++ Deep Hierarchy
description: Deep inheritance hierarchy detected. Consider using composition or flattening the hierarchy.

title: C++ Tight Coupling
description: Tight coupling detected. Consider using forward declarations, interfaces, or dependency injection to reduce coupling.

title: PHP SQL Injection
description: SQL query with string concatenation. Use prepared statements (PDO or mysqli_prepare) to prevent SQL injection.

title: PHP Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
description: Unsanitized user input in output. Use htmlspecialchars() or htmlentities() before outputting user data.

title: PHP File Inclusion Vulnerability
description: include/require with user input. Never include files based on user input. Use whitelist validation.

title: PHP Deprecated Function
description: Usage of deprecated PHP function (mysql_*, each, ereg*, create_function). Use modern alternatives.

title: PHP Loose Comparison
description: Loose comparison (== or !=) with type-coercive values. Use strict comparison (=== or !==) to avoid unexpected behavior.

title: PHP Path Traversal
description: Path traversal vulnerability. User input used in file operations without validation. Use basename() or realpath() to sanitize paths.

title: PHP Command Injection
description: Command injection vulnerability. User input used in shell execution without escaping. Use escapeshellarg() or escapeshellcmd() to sanitize input.

title: PHP N+1 Query Problem
description: N+1 query problem. Database query inside loop causes multiple queries. Use eager loading or batch queries.

title: PHP Slow Query
description: Inefficient SQL query detected. Optimize query with proper indexes, avoid SELECT *, add WHERE clauses.

title: PHP Memory Leak
description: Potential memory leak. Resource created without proper cleanup. Ensure resources are freed (fclose, imagedestroy, curl_close).

title: PHP Blocking I/O
description: Blocking I/O operation detected. Consider using async operations or background processing for better performance.

title: PHP Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to named constant for better readability and maintainability.

title: PHP Unused Import
description: Unused import detected. Remove unused use statements to keep code clean.

title: PHP Broad Exception Handling
description: Catching generic Exception or Throwable. Catch specific exception types for better error handling.

title: PHP Missing Type Hint
description: Function parameter or return type missing type hint. Add type hints for better code clarity and IDE support.

title: PHP Resource Leak
description: Resource created without proper cleanup. Ensure resources are freed to prevent resource leaks.

title: Laravel N+1 Query Problem
description: N+1 query problem. Eloquent relationship accessed in loop without eager loading. Use ->with() or ->load() to eager load relationships.

title: Laravel Missing Authentication
description: Controller method or route missing authentication. Add @auth middleware or ->middleware('auth') to protect this route.

title: Laravel Missing Validation
description: Request input accessed without validation. Validate input using $request->validate() or FormRequest.

title: Laravel Missing Eager Loading
description: Relationship accessed without eager loading. Consider eager loading with ->with() if used in loops.

title: Laravel Missing Index
description: Foreign key column missing index. Add ->index() for better query performance.

title: PHP Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependency detected. Review dependencies and consider refactoring.

title: PHP God Class
description: God class detected (too many lines, methods, or properties). Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes.

title: PHP Deep Nesting
description: Deep nesting detected. Consider refactoring to reduce complexity and improve readability.

title: PHP Tight Coupling
description: Tight coupling detected. Consider using dependency injection or interfaces to reduce coupling.

title: Swift Retain Cycle
description: Strong reference to self in closure may cause retain cycle. Use [weak self] or [unowned self] in capture list.

title: Swift Force Unwrap
description: Force unwrapping optional (!). Use optional binding (if let/guard let) or optional chaining (?.) for safer code.

title: Swift Implicitly Unwrapped Optional
description: Implicitly unwrapped optional (Type!) outside of outlets. Consider using regular optional (Type?) for safer code.

title: Swift Main Thread Blocking
description: Blocking operation on main thread (DispatchQueue.main.sync or sleep). This will freeze the UI.

title: Swift Data Race
description: Mutable shared state without synchronization. Consider using actor, @MainActor, or synchronization primitives.

title: Swift SQL Injection
description: SQL injection risk. Use parameterized queries (NSPredicate, SQLite.swift with bindings, or Core Data) instead of string interpolation.

title: Swift XSS
description: XSS risk. Escape user input before rendering in web views. Use addingPercentEncoding, htmlEscaped, or similar escaping methods.

title: Swift Path Traversal
description: Path traversal risk. Sanitize file paths using lastPathComponent, pathComponents, or standardizingPath before file operations.

title: Swift Slow Collection
description: Inefficient collection operations. Consider using Set for O(1) lookup or combining operations.

title: Swift Memory Leak
description: Memory leak detected. Remove observers, invalidate timers, or use weak references to prevent leaks.

title: Swift Blocking Async
description: Blocking async operations. Use TaskGroup or async let to run operations concurrently instead of sequentially.

title: Swift Inefficient String
description: Inefficient string operations. Consider using String interpolation or building strings more efficiently.

title: Swift Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Extract to a named constant with descriptive name.

title: Swift Unused Import
description: Unused import detected. Remove if not needed.

title: Swift Missing Error Handling
description: Throwing function called without error handling. Wrap in do-catch or use try? for proper error handling.

title: Swift Resource Leak
description: Resource opened without cleanup. Use defer or ensure cleanup in deinit.

title: Swift Strong Reference Cycle
description: Potential strong reference cycle between classes. Consider using weak or unowned reference if appropriate.

title: Swift Race Condition
description: Mutable shared state accessed from concurrent contexts may cause race conditions. Use actor isolation or synchronization.

title: Swift Actor Isolation
description: Actor isolation violation. Ensure proper isolation when accessing actor properties or methods.

title: Swift Circular Dependency
description: Potential circular dependencies detected. Consider using protocols or dependency injection to break cycles.

title: Swift God Class
description: God class detected. Consider splitting into smaller, focused classes/structs.

title: Swift Deep Hierarchy
description: Deep inheritance hierarchy detected. Consider using composition or flattening the hierarchy.

title: Swift Tight Coupling
description: Tight coupling detected. Consider using protocols or dependency injection to reduce coupling.

title: SQL Injection Risk
description: Dynamic SQL construction. Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection.

title: SQL Weak Authentication
description: Weak password hashing (MD5/SHA1). Use bcrypt, scrypt, or Argon2.

title: SQL UPDATE Without WHERE
description: UPDATE without WHERE clause updates all rows. Add WHERE or confirm intent.

title: SQL DELETE Without WHERE
description: DELETE without WHERE clause deletes all rows. Add WHERE or use TRUNCATE.

title: SQL GRANT ALL
description: GRANT ALL grants excessive privileges. Use principle of least privilege.

title: SQL SELECT *
description: SELECT * retrieves all columns. Specify only required columns.

title: SQL Missing Index Hint
description: Query on large table without index hint. Consider adding index hints.

title: SQL Cartesian Join
description: JOIN without ON clause creates Cartesian product. Add ON clause.

title: SQL Subquery in SELECT
description: Correlated subquery in SELECT list. Use JOIN or window functions.

title: SQL OR in WHERE
description: OR in WHERE clause may prevent index usage. Use IN or UNION.

title: SQL Function on Indexed Column
description: Function on indexed column prevents index usage. Use computed columns.

title: SQL Implicit Conversion
description: Type mismatch causes implicit conversion. Match types to use indexes.

title: SQL Missing LIMIT
description: SELECT without LIMIT may return large result sets. Add LIMIT clause.

title: SQL Reserved Keyword
description: Using reserved keyword as identifier. Enclose in backticks or rename.

title: SQL Inconsistent Naming
description: Mixed naming conventions (camelCase and snake_case). Be consistent.

title: SQL Missing Foreign Key
description: Column with _id suffix has no foreign key constraint. Add FOREIGN KEY.

title: SQL TEXT/VARCHAR Primary Key
description: TEXT/VARCHAR as primary key is inefficient. Use numeric ID.

title: SQL FLOAT Equality Comparison
description: Equality comparison on FLOAT/DOUBLE is unreliable. Use range or DECIMAL.

title: SQL Timestamp as String
description: Storing timestamp as string. Use DATETIME or TIMESTAMP type.

title: SQL Unescaped Input
description: Unescaped input in SQL statement. Use parameterized queries or proper escaping.

title: SQL Privilege Escalation
description: SQL statement may allow privilege escalation. Review and restrict permissions.

title: SQL Sensitive Data Exposure
description: Query may expose sensitive data without proper filtering or encryption.

title: SQL Missing Index
description: Query or table missing indexes. Add indexes for better performance.

title: SQL Full Table Scan
description: Query may cause full table scan. Add WHERE clause or indexes.

title: SQL Inefficient Join
description: JOIN may be inefficient. Ensure join columns are indexed.

title: SQL N+1 Query Problem
description: Multiple queries in sequence may indicate N+1 problem. Use JOIN or batch queries.

title: SQL Slow Query
description: Query structure may be slow. Optimize query or add indexes.

title: SQL Magic Number
description: Magic number detected. Use named constants for better readability.

title: SQL Unused Table
description: Table is created but not referenced. Verify table is needed.

title: SQL Complex Query
description: Complex query detected. Consider breaking into smaller queries or using views.

title: SQL Missing Comment
description: SQL statement without comment. Add comment to document purpose.

title: SQL Missing Constraint
description: Table or column missing constraint. Add constraints to ensure data integrity.

title: SQL Nullable Key
description: PRIMARY KEY or UNIQUE column allows NULL. Keys should be NOT NULL.

title: SQL Duplicate Key
description: Duplicate PRIMARY KEY or UNIQUE constraint. Review constraint definitions.

title: Flaky Test
description: Test uses non-deterministic patterns (Math.random(), Date.now(), setTimeout). Makes tests unreliable.

title: Missing Assertion
description: Test function has no assertions. Tests should verify expected behavior.

title: Test Isolation Issue
description: Test mutates global state or shared resources without cleanup. Can cause test interference.

title: Complex Test
description: Test has high cyclomatic complexity (>10). Consider splitting into smaller, focused tests.
